Boat Details

Description

Heliophilia is a great opportunity to own one of the most spacious yachts in the 27-meter range. Built by Sirena Yachts in 2024, she combines comfort, smart design, and excellent range for long-distance cruising, with a capability of up to 2,290 nautical miles at 9 knots, thanks to her enhanced 14,000-liter fuel tank.

This is a unique version of the Sirena 88, featuring a dedicated office, a separate TV lounge, and a rare second day head on the lower deck—a layout tailored for versatility and extended time on board. She comfortably sleeps 9 guests in 4 well-appointed cabins, and 4 crew members in 2 crew cabins, ensuring smooth operations and a high level of service.

One of the standout features is the large sundeck, which includes a dining area under a hardtop, a full bar, a grill, and a jacuzzi—perfect for relaxing or entertaining. At the bow, there’s a private dining area that connects directly to the master cabin through a sliding door, offering a quiet and private spot to enjoy the views.

The interior is bright and open, with a full-beam master on the main deck, and three guest cabins below. With just 70 hours on the engines, Heliophilia is in excellent condition and ready for her next adventure.

Contact Information
Please contact Ioannis Petrocheilos at +30 698 683 8882
